description_long: This is a rounded ceramic plant pot with a wide, thick rim and a gently tapering base. The exterior is decorated with a vibrant floral pattern in yellow and pink, featuring stylized flowers and swirling motifs on a white background. The rim and base are a solid pale yellow, providing a bold contrast to the patterned body. The pot has a glossy, smooth finish, suggesting it is glazed for both aesthetic appeal and durability. The interior appears hollow and spacious, suitable for holding soil and a medium-sized plant. There are no visible handles or drainage holes on the exterior.
description: A glossy, round ceramic plant pot with a yellow rim and base, decorated with a bright yellow and pink floral pattern on a white background.
description_view_0: Front view shows the floral pattern with a prominent central flower and the thick yellow rim and base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights more abstract floral motifs and less dense patterning, with the yellow rim and base still visible.
description_view_2: The pattern here is more spread out, with large yellow swirls and fewer central flowers visible.
description_view_3: This view displays a different arrangement of the floral pattern, with a focus on a single flower and more white space.
attribute_placement_context: ideal for bright, decorative outdoor spaces such as patios or garden entrances
attribute_decorative_pattern: yellow and pink floral motifs with swirling accents
